title: herniaria alpina var. frigida
intro: Herniaria alpina var. frigida, also known as Alpina Winter Herniaria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Herniaria alpina var. frigida include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots can be used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health issues.
